home.heroSubtitle:
A bar and concert venue in the heart of Stavanger.
Nedre Strandgate 23, by the waterfront.

gnuSoundsCard.title: Gnu Sounds
gnuSoundsCard.description: Full-length recordings of concerts and gigs at Gnu. Watch and listen to live music from our stage.

gnuRauaCard.title: Gnu-Rauå
gnuRauaCard.description: The story of Stavanger's most unnecessary monument — and why it matters.

bookingCard.title: Booking
bookingCard.description: Book Gnu for private events, corporate parties, birthdays, or other occasions.

gnuSounds.description: Video recordings from Gnu's finest musical moments. Concerts, jam sessions, and unforgettable evenings.

gnuRaua.subtitle: Stavanger's most unnecessary monument — and why it matters
gnuRaua.content1: Gnu-Rauå is more than just a monument made of foam and fur. It is a symbol of the unexpected, the absurd, and what makes Stavanger such a special city. Here at Gnu, we can sit and share stories about a gnu that never lived, but who lives on in our hearts.
gnuRaua.content2: The full story is coming soon. For now, we know that Gnu-Rauå is writing its own legend, one chapter at a time, one toast at a time, and a kind of jealous love for this city and this flock.
gnuRaua.content3: Welcome to the monument that no one saw coming, but everyone needs.

om.mainDescription: Gnu is a rock'n'roll bar located by the waterfront with fantastic views over the harbor. We are known for our famous sausages, fun quizzes, and live music that gets people dancing even when they just want to drink beer.
om.secondaryDescription: At Gnu, you can sit and look out over the waterfront, at all the other herd animals.

musicBar.title: Music Bar
musicBar.description: Live concerts, jazz jam sessions, DJ nights, and vinyl listening parties. Music is the lifeblood of Gnu.

quiz.title: Quiz & Entertainment
quiz.description: The Thursday quiz is famous. Bingo, music trivia, and other fun activities year-round.

food.title: Food & Drink
food.description: Famous sausages, a good selection of beer and spirits, and everything you need to keep the energy up.

view.title: Views & Atmosphere
view.description: Harbor views from Stavanger. Cozy brutalist interior and a herd mentality that warms the heart.

booking.bookingInfoText1: Gnu is available for private events, corporate parties, concerts, and other arrangements. We have experience with everything from small meetings to larger festivals.
booking.bookingInfoText2: Contact us with details about your event, and we can discuss options and pricing.
